updates.title: Birth of This Website
updates.description: This website is built using Gemini and Google Stitch, without any prior HTML knowledge. Therefore, a decent human-in-the-loop example of AI-aided web design projects :-)

updates.title: Midterm Review Passed!
updates.description: Presented my doctoral study so far in the past two years. And now a PhD candidate.

updates.title: Conference Oral Presentation
updates.description: Presented the accepted paper at the International Conference on Advanced Systems in Public Transport (CASPT) in Kyoto, on the multi-line short-term passenger loading prediction via GNN.

updates.title: Paper Accepted by CASPT
updates.description: Paper 'Multi-line Short-term Onboard Passenger Loading Prediction via Relational Multi-graph Convolutional-recurrent Networks' was accepted for oral presentation!

research.title: Double-battery configuration method for electric bus operation in cold regions
research.venue: Transportation Research Part E: Logistics and Transportation Review, 180, 103362
research.description: In this study, we propose a double-battery configuration approach for EBs operating in cold regions with substantial temperature variations between seasons. The method involves utilizing a higher-capacity battery during winter months and a lower-capacity battery for summer operations.

research.title: Optimal charging pile configuration and charging scheduling for electric bus routes
research.description: This paper considers the influence of ambient temperature on battery charging performance, and collaboratively optimizes the number of charging piles in the bus depot and the scheduling problem of EB charging.

research.title: A state of health estimation method for electric vehicle Li-ion batteries using GA-PSO-SVR
research.description: In this study, the random forest algorithm is first used to find the most important health factors to lithium-ion batteries based on the dataset released by National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA). Then the support vector regression (SVR) algorithm is developed to predict the SOH of a lithium-ion battery. The genetic algorithm-particle swarm optimization (GA-PSO) algorithm is brought forward to optimize the parameter values of the SVR, which could improve the estimation accuracy and convergence speed.

projects.title: Web Design with Gemini & Stitch
projects.description: An exploration into vibe coding and human-in-the-loop web design using Gemini and Google Stitch, without any prior HTML knowledge.

projects.title: Chiffon Cake Baking
projects.description: A personal project documenting the process of perfecting a chiffon cake recipe, exploring the science of baking and the art of flavor combinations.

projects.title: Ai-aided deCision tool for seamless mUltiModal nEtwork and traffic managemeNt (ACUMEN)
projects.description: A research project focused on developing an AI-aided decision tool for seamless multimodal network and traffic management, aiming to optimize transportation systems and enhance urban mobility.

projects.title: LLM-based Reasoning for Traffic Anomalies
projects.description: A research initiative investigating the application of large language models (LLMs) for reasoning and analysis of traffic anomalies, with the goal of improving traffic management and incident response strategies.
